ServerSettings.ArticleClassificationPromptTemplate:
Analyze the provided news article and classify it into exactly one of the following primary categories. Also, identify specific technical sub-topics to be used as internal labels.

Categories:
Markets: (Stock reports, technical analysis, insider buying/selling, equity movements).
Technology: (AI breakthroughs, quantum computing progress, hardware innovation).
Economy: (Inflation, interest rates, GDP, geopolitical events affecting trade/wealth).
Startup: (VC funding, valuations, M&A, trending GitHub tools/repos).
Crypto: (Crypto price action, blockchain upgrades, forks, Web3).
Security: (Cybersecurity, privacy, deepfake defense, online safety).

Article Content:
{CONTENT}

Output Format (JSON only):
{
  "category": "The category name",
  "labels": ["label1", "label2", "label3"],
  "confidence_score": 0.0,
  "summary": "One sentence summary"
}
